title: Exponentiation on a Peano System
statement:
Let $(P,S,1)$ be a Peano system. For each $a \in P$, define the function
\[
h_a : P \to P
\]
to be the unique function satisfying
\[
h_a(1)=a
\qquad\text{and}\qquad
\forall n \in P\;(h_a(S(n))=h_a(n)\cdot a).
\]
For $a,n \in P$, define
\[
a^n \coloneqq h_a(n).
\]
